syncData.content:
{"settings":"{
	/* ------------ Workbench Settings ------------ */
	"workbench.colorCustomizations": {
		"inlineparameters.annotationBackground": "#282A3600",
		"inlineparameters.annotationForeground": "#7b82af",
		"scrollbar.shadow": "#24292e00"
	},
	"workbench.iconTheme": "material-icon-theme",
	"workbench.productIconTheme": "fluent-icons",
	"workbench.editorLargeFileConfirmation": 10024,
	"workbench.editor.showTabs": "single",
	"workbench.tree.indent": 16,
	"workbench.startupEditor": "none",
	"workbench.editor.empty.hint": "hidden",

	/* ------------ Breadcrumbs Configurations ------------ */
	"breadcrumbs.enabled": false,
	"breadcrumbs.symbolPath": "off",
	"breadcrumbs.filePath": "on",
	"editor.fontSize": 16,
	"editor.fontWeight": 450,
	"editor.lineHeight": 26,
	"editor.lineNumbers": "on",
	"editor.folding": true,
	"editor.glyphMargin": true,
	"editor.guides.indentation": false,
	"editor.scrollbar.horizontal": "visible",
	"editor.unicodeHighlight.ambiguousCharacters": false,
	"editor.unicodeHighlight.invisibleCharacters": false,
	"editor.cursorStyle": "line",
	"editor.minimap.enabled": false,
	"editor.wordWrap": "on",
	"editor.stickyScroll.enabled": true,

	/* ------------ Terminal Configurations ------------ */
	"terminal.integrated.defaultProfile.osx": "bash",
	"terminal.integrated.defaultProfile.windows": "Command Prompt",
	"terminal.integrated.fontSize": 14,
	"terminal.integrated.enableMultiLinePasteWarning": false,
	"terminal.integrated.cursorStyle": "line",
	"terminal.integrated.cursorBlinking": true,

	/* ------------ Additional Configurations ------------ */
	"vscode_custom_css.imports": ["file:///C:/Users/ThinkPad%20X1%20Yoga/.vscode/vscode-custom/style.css", "file:///C:/Users/ThinkPad%20X1%20Yoga/.vscode/vscode-custom/script.js"],
	"console-ninja.featureSet": "Community",
	"files.autoSave": "onWindowChange",
	"workbench.sideBar.location": "right",
	"workbench.layoutControl.enabled": false,
	"extensions.ignoreRecommendations": true,

	/* ------------ Prettier Configurations ------------ */
	"editor.defaultFormatter": "esbenp.prettier-vscode",
	"prettier.singleQuote": true,
	"prettier.printWidth": 800,
	"prettier.trailingComma": "all",
	"editor.formatOnSave": true,
	"prettier.useTabs": true,
	"prettier.bracketSpacing": true,
	"prettier.tabWidth": 4,
	"liveServer.settings.donotShowInfoMsg": true,
	"explorer.confirmDragAndDrop": false,
	"explorer.confirmDelete": false,
	"chat.editing.alwaysSaveWithGeneratedChanges": true,
	"terminal.explorerKind": "both",
	"terminal.external.windowsExec": "C:\\Program Files\\WezTerm\\wezterm.exe",
	"terminal.integrated.env.linux": {},
	"reactSnippets.settings.prettierEnabled": true,
	"editor.fontFamily": "JetBrains Mono",
	"editor.fontLigatures": true,
	"workbench.colorTheme": "One Dark Pro Darker",
	"terminal.integrated.env.windows": {},
	"workbench.statusBar.visible": false,
	"codeium.enableCodeLens": "hide_x",
	"mssql.enableRichExperiencesDoNotShowPrompt": true,
	"typescript.updateImportsOnFileMove.enabled": "always"
}"}
